fields.name: Silver Stake
fields.rules_text_raw:
Attach to target exhausted enemy Creature.
You cannot activate this card to gain its stats.
While Attached to a non-Boss creature,
attached creature is silenced, and cannot strike or ready.
Turn Start: If this card is attached to a Blood, Darkness or
Undead creature, deal this cards Attack as damage to
attached creature. If this card is attached to a Boss creature,
deal this cards Attack as damage to attached creature.
